Analytics Beacon Explorer docs-site · web-vitals + client-errors

Two fail-open, first-party beacons that POST to /api/analytics (which HMAC-signs + forwards to /api/analytics/ingest). No SaaS, no HMAC hand-rolled client-side. Configure the behavior on the left and watch the exact beacon payload — the same shape WebVitalsReporter and reportClientError emit.

Page speed scenario

Vitals tracked

sent (cap 25)
